summary: Created manifest-driven bootloader core with install.py and verify.py scripts. Manifest maps 7 payload destinations to target directories. install.py supports dry-run, force, verbose modes with conflict detection and logging. verify.py validates 65 checks including file existence, content validation, and placeholder detection. Successfully tested: dry-run shows 39 files would be installed, force install completes with 0 errors, verify detects expected placeholder markers awaiting personalization.
learnings: The verify.py script correctly detects placeholder markers that need personalization - this is expected behavior until D3 implements the personalization engine

test_results.dry_run: Shows 39 files would be installed across 7 destinations
test_results.force_install: Completes without error, installs 39 files with proper logging
test_results.verify: Passes 55/65 checks - 10 failures are expected placeholder markers awaiting personalization
test_results.conflict_detection: Correctly identifies 39 existing files when run without --force
test_results.help_documentation: Both scripts provide comprehensive help and usage examples
